Event: Magic Training - Flying Hedgehog
Event Date: 23/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR156
Flying Hedgehog Tamer Gear

When taking damage from an enemy mage's abilities, the unit has a 50% chance to gain a shield that absorbs blocks any 2 attacks and lasts for up to 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

When taking damage from the abilities of enemy warriors or archers, the unit has a 50% chance to increase their max health, as well as physical and magic armor by 15% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
